Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: With the tanker removed from the formation, we can now order Lütjens and Narvik to Ahead Flank and the two ships will begin steaming at their highest available speed of 24 knots, now limited by Narvik's best speed.
Note that the tanker is now in its own single-ship formation, and can be given its own waypoints and speed orders. Order it southwest at flank speed towards Great Britain now.
